case_title: JOHN TRACEY VS. LUXOR CAB COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,722.00 FILED BY TRACEY, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RICK LARSEN--CLAIMS MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
